notes: Implemented first Kanboard dry-run surface under StatiBaker: sb/kanboard_runsheet.py plus scripts/plan_kanboard_runsheet.py and focused tests. Dry-run plan emits required RPC shape (getTaskByReference, createTask, updateTask, moveTaskPosition, saveTaskMetadata), keeps local JSON canonical, and preserves metadata/provenance without live mutation.
